name: Mini Project - Network Traffic Analysis (3 Cases Union)
description: Combined MITRE ATT&CK coverage from 3 PCAP cases (2024-09-04, 2024-11-26, 2025-06-13). Score = number of cases where technique was identified. Layer is suitable for upload to https://mitre-attack.github.io/attack-navigator/ via 'Open Existing Layer' > 'Upload from local'.

techniques.comment:
Detected in 3 case(s)

[case1] Encoded/encrypted body and binary blob with minimal readable strings

[case2] Body CMD=ENCD · ES=1 encoding on all beacon payloads

[case3] 968KB obfuscated PS script with ${Get-...} variable manipulation (sandbox evasion)

Detected in 3 case(s)

[case1] Legacy Mozilla/4.0 MSIE 7.0 User-Agent on Windows 10.0

[case2] Endpoint /fakeurl.htm uses generic name to disguise C2 traffic

[case3] Microsoft-like domain typosquatting: event-datamicrosoft.live, windows-msgas.com, event-time-microsoft.org

Detected in 1 case(s)

[case3] URI pattern with &32-char-hex substring (MD5-like) suggests encoded data exfiltration - content not decoded

Detected in 2 case(s)

[case1] Lightweight: HTTP GET to Adobe CDN and Microsoft services for host enumeration (NCSI-like)

[case3] POST to 10.6.13.129:5357/e762ae39-... (WSDAPI) - Windows Web Services on Devices API for local network enumeration

Detected in 1 case(s)

[case2] Hypothesis: NetSupport Manager client may execute commands on victim (not visible in network traffic)

Detected in 1 case(s)

[case3] WindowsPowerShell/5.1.26100.4202 User-Agent + 968KB PS script with Invoke-WebRequest, Compress-Archive, oauth2 token

Detected in 3 case(s)

[case1] HTTP POST to /foots.php and /index.php - direct IP C2 channel

[case2] 58 HTTP POST to /fakeurl.htm - direct IP C2 channel

[case3] 64 HTTP POST to 5 C2 domains (typosquat + Cloudflare tunnel)

Detected in 1 case(s)

[case3] Cloudflare Tunnel (trycloudflare.com) hides origin C2 IP

Detected in 2 case(s)

[case1] Possible Adobe CDN dead-drop style lookup (acroipm2.adobe.com) - confidence medium

[case3] Use of oauth2.googleapis.com/token and aadcdn.msftauth.net in payload (confidence medium)

Detected in 3 case(s)

[case1] C2 config response redirects to /index.php for secondary payload

[case2] Initial handshake body (250B) and response (152B) for tasking transfer

[case3] Download 968.1 KB obfuscated PowerShell payload from 104.21.112.1

Detected in 3 case(s)

[case1] Hypothesis: malicious webpage or document with embedded download (no direct evidence in PCAP)

[case2] Hypothesis: social engineering or drive-by deploys NetSupport Manager client (no direct evidence in PCAP)

[case3] Hypothesis: malicious script delivered via phishing/document, executed via PowerShell (not visible in network)

Detected in 1 case(s)

[case2] NetSupport Manager/1.3 User-Agent - commercial RAT abused as RAT
